"C:\Program Files\CMake\bin\cmake.exe" -E rm -f CMakeFiles\armadillo.dir/objects.a
C:\Users\skwor\gcc\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\armadillo.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\armadillo.dir\objects1.rsp
C:\Users\skwor\gcc\bin\c++.exe  -O2 -shared -o libarmadillo.dll -Wl,--out-implib,libarmadillo.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,12,--minor-image-version,0 -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\armadillo.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive @CMakeFiles\armadillo.dir\linkLibs.rsp
